result.reason: The application crashes when closing an RDP panel, likely due to a race condition during the disposal of the underlying ActiveX COM object, specifically involving `Marshal.FinalReleaseComObject` in `RdpProtocol.CleanupResources()`.
result.approach: Introduce a flag in `RdpProtocol` to ensure `CleanupResources()` is executed only once, and carefully synchronize the disposal of the ActiveX COM object to prevent race conditions. This includes ensuring `Marshal.FinalReleaseComObject` is called safely and only when necessary, and adding defensive null checks around `_rdpClient` during cleanup.
